title: FPS boost by Momiji
description: This modpack has 2.5 times more FPS than the vanilla version and twice as much as sodium.
body:
# **FPS boost by Momiji** **The modpack has about 2.5 times more FPS than vanilla and 2 times as much as sodium. In addition, there are minor changes such as: you see the head of the player who is writing in the chat (Chat Heads), connected blocks. Blocks that are connected together: glass, sandstone and others (Continuity), animation of eating food (Eating Animation), working with texture packs for optifine (CIT Resewn, [EMF] Entity Model Features, [ETF] Entity Texture Features), another ping in tab (Better Ping Display [Fabric]), easy language search (Language Reload), loading screen when launching Minecraft (Mod Loading Screen), showing memory usage when launching the game and on the loading screen (Memory Usage Screen), showing mods directly in the game (Mod Menu), animation of bubbles in water (Make Bubbles Pop).**

(The screenshot shows the standard settings)
